description: Application starts up and displays main menu with all buttons visible
steps: Step 1: Run init.sh to start the application
Step 2: Navigate to localhost on the specified port
Step 3: Verify main menu is displayed
Step 4: Verify New Game button is visible and clickable
Step 5: Verify Continue Game button is visible
Step 6: Verify Settings button is visible
Step 7: Verify About/Help button is visible

description: New Game button starts game with initial player stats on floor 0
steps: Step 1: Click New Game button from main menu
Step 2: Verify game screen loads
Step 3: Verify player is on floor 0 (Ground Floor)
Step 4: Verify player HP is 1000/1000
Step 5: Verify player ATK is 10
Step 6: Verify player DEF is 10
Step 7: Verify player Gold is 0
Step 8: Verify player has 1 Yellow Key
Step 9: Verify player has 0 Blue Keys
Step 10: Verify player has 0 Red Keys
Step 11: Verify steps counter is 0

description: Arrow keys move player character one tile at a time
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Press up arrow key
Step 3: Verify player moves up one tile
Step 4: Press down arrow key
Step 5: Verify player moves down one tile
Step 6: Press left arrow key
Step 7: Verify player moves left one tile
Step 8: Press right arrow key
Step 9: Verify player moves right one tile
Step 10: Verify movement increments step counter

description: WASD keys move player character one tile at a time
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Press W key
Step 3: Verify player moves up one tile
Step 4: Press S key
Step 5: Verify player moves down one tile
Step 6: Press A key
Step 7: Verify player moves left one tile
Step 8: Press D key
Step 9: Verify player moves right one tile

description: Mouse click on adjacent tile moves player to that tile
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Click on tile directly above player
Step 3: Verify player moves to that tile
Step 4: Click on tile directly below player
Step 5: Verify player moves to that tile
Step 6: Click on tile directly left of player
Step 7: Verify player moves to that tile
Step 8: Click on tile directly right of player
Step 9: Verify player moves to that tile

description: Player cannot walk through wall tiles
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Identify a wall tile adjacent to player
Step 3: Attempt to move into wall tile
Step 4: Verify player remains in current position
Step 5: Verify step counter did not increment

description: Player automatically picks up small potion when stepping on it
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Locate a small potion on the map
Step 3: Move player onto small potion tile
Step 4: Verify small potion disappears from map
Step 5: Verify player HP increases by 200 (capped at max)
Step 6: Verify message log shows potion pickup
Step 7: Verify stat change animation displays

description: Player automatically picks up big potion when stepping on it
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Locate a big potion on floor 2 or higher
Step 3: Move player onto big potion tile
Step 4: Verify big potion disappears from map
Step 5: Verify player HP increases by 500 (capped at max)
Step 6: Verify message log shows potion pickup

description: Player automatically picks up super potion and HP is fully restored
steps: Step 1: Start a new game and reduce HP below max
Step 2: Locate a super potion on higher floors
Step 3: Move player onto super potion tile
Step 4: Verify super potion disappears from map
Step 5: Verify player HP is restored to max
Step 6: Verify message log shows full heal

description: Player automatically picks up yellow key and count increases
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Locate a yellow key on floor 0
Step 3: Move player onto yellow key tile
Step 4: Verify yellow key disappears from map
Step 5: Verify yellow key count increases by 1
Step 6: Verify message log shows key pickup

description: Player automatically picks up blue key and count increases
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Locate a blue key on floor 1
Step 4: Move player onto blue key tile
Step 5: Verify blue key disappears from map
Step 6: Verify blue key count increases by 1
Step 7: Verify message log shows key pickup

description: Player automatically picks up red key and count increases
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 4
Step 3: Locate a red key on floor 4
Step 4: Move player onto red key tile
Step 5: Verify red key disappears from map
Step 6: Verify red key count increases by 1
Step 7: Verify message log shows key pickup

description: Player picks up red gem and ATK increases by 3
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to red gem on floor 0
Step 3: Move player onto red gem tile
Step 4: Verify red gem disappears from map
Step 5: Verify ATK increases by 3
Step 6: Verify message log shows ATK increase

description: Player picks up blue gem and DEF increases by 3
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Locate blue gem on floor 1
Step 4: Move player onto blue gem tile
Step 5: Verify blue gem disappears from map
Step 6: Verify DEF increases by 3
Step 7: Verify message log shows DEF increase

description: Player picks up green gem and both ATK and DEF increase by 1
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 2
Step 3: Locate green gem on floor 2
Step 4: Move player onto green gem tile
Step 5: Verify green gem disappears from map
Step 6: Verify ATK increases by 1
Step 7: Verify DEF increases by 1
Step 8: Verify message log shows stat increases

description: Player picks up gold pile and gold count increases
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Locate gold pile on floor 1
Step 4: Move player onto gold pile tile
Step 5: Verify gold pile disappears from map
Step 6: Verify gold increases by 50
Step 7: Verify message log shows gold pickup

description: Player picks up big gold pile and gold count increases by 200

Step 2: Navigate to floor with big gold pile
Step 3: Move player onto big gold pile tile
Step 4: Verify big gold pile disappears from map
Step 5: Verify gold increases by 200
Step 6: Verify message log shows gold pickup

description: Player with yellow key can open yellow door
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Verify player has at least 1 yellow key
Step 3: Navigate to yellow door
Step 4: Move player onto yellow door tile
Step 5: Verify yellow door disappears from map
Step 6: Verify yellow key count decreases by 1
Step 7: Verify player moves to door tile
Step 8: Verify message log shows door opened

description: Player without yellow key cannot open yellow door
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Use all yellow keys to open doors
Step 3: Navigate to another yellow door with 0 yellow keys
Step 4: Attempt to move onto yellow door tile
Step 5: Verify player does not move
Step 6: Verify yellow key count is still 0
Step 7: Verify door remains on map
Step 8: Verify message log shows need yellow key

description: Player with blue key can open blue door
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Collect blue key
Step 4: Navigate to blue door
Step 5: Move player onto blue door tile
Step 6: Verify blue door disappears from map
Step 7: Verify blue key count decreases by 1
Step 8: Verify player moves to door tile
Step 9: Verify message log shows door opened

description: Player with red key can open red door
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 4
Step 3: Collect red key
Step 4: Navigate to red door
Step 5: Move player onto red door tile
Step 6: Verify red door disappears from map
Step 7: Verify red key count decreases by 1
Step 8: Verify player moves to door tile
Step 9: Verify message log shows door opened

description: Player can use stairs up to go to next floor
steps: Step 1: Start a new game on floor 0
Step 2: Navigate to stairs up
Step 3: Move player onto stairs up tile
Step 4: Verify screen transitions with fade animation
Step 5: Verify player is now on floor 1
Step 6: Verify floor indicator shows floor 1
Step 7: Verify message log shows entered floor 1

description: Player can use stairs down to go to previous floor
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Locate stairs down on floor 1
Step 4: Move player onto stairs down tile
Step 5: Verify screen transitions with fade animation
Step 6: Verify player is now on floor 0
Step 7: Verify floor indicator shows floor 0
Step 8: Verify message log shows entered floor 0

description: Player combat with Green Slime (easy monster) is resolved correctly
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Navigate to Green Slime on floor 0
Step 3: Record current HP and stats
Step 4: Move player onto Green Slime tile
Step 5: Verify combat overlay appears
Step 6: Verify damage numbers are displayed
Step 7: Verify combat resolves with player victory
Step 8: Verify Green Slime is removed from map
Step 9: Verify player HP decreased correctly (HP - (Monster ATK - Player DEF) per round)
Step 10: Verify message log shows combat result
Step 11: Verify player remains on tile after combat

description: Game can be saved to slot 1
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Play for some time and collect items
Step 3: Open save/load menu
Step 4: Click save to slot 1
Step 5: Verify save confirmation message
Step 6: Verify slot 1 shows current save data

description: Game can be saved to slot 2
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Play for some time and collect items
Step 3: Open save/load menu
Step 4: Click save to slot 2

description: Game can be saved to slot 3

description: Saved game can be loaded from slot

Step 2: Play and save to slot 1

description: Auto-save triggers when entering new floor

Step 2: Navigate to stairs up on floor 0
Step 3: Move onto stairs

Step 5: Verify floor transition occurs
Step 6: Verify save was created in background

description: Continue Game button loads most recent auto-save
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Play through multiple floors
Step 3: Quit to main menu

Step 5: Verify game loads from most recent save

description: Settings modal opens and displays all settings

description: Settings changes are persisted

Step 2: Change music volume to 50%

Step 6: Open settings modal again
Step 7: Verify music volume is still 50%

description: Help/Tutorial screen is accessible from main menu

Step 4: Verify control reference is visible

description: Help/Tutorial screen is accessible during gameplay

Step 2: Click help button during gameplay
Step 3: Verify help screen opens
Step 4: Verify game is paused in background

Step 6: Verify game resumes

description: Victory screen appears after defeating Tower Lord

Step 2: Progress through all floors to floor 10
Step 3: Defeat Tower Lord
Step 4: Verify victory screen appears
Step 5: Verify congratulations message is shown
Step 6: Verify final stats are displayed
Step 7: Verify score is calculated and shown
Step 8: Verify play time is displayed
Step 9: Verify Return to main menu button works
Step 10: Verify New Game+ option is available

description: Game Over screen Retry button loads last save
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Play and create a save
Step 3: Get defeated by a monster
Step 4: Verify game over screen appears
Step 5: Click Retry from last save
Step 6: Verify game loads from save
Step 7: Verify player is restored to saved state

description: Game Over screen Return to main menu works
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Get defeated by a monster
Step 3: Verify game over screen appears
Step 4: Click Return to main menu

Step 6: Verify all menu buttons are visible

description: Game Over screen Restart from beginning works
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Get defeated by a monster
Step 3: Verify game over screen appears
Step 4: Click Restart from beginning
Step 5: Verify new game starts on floor 0
Step 6: Verify player stats are reset to initial values

description: Step counter increments with each movement
steps: Step 1: Start a new game
Step 2: Verify step counter shows 0
Step 3: Move player one tile
Step 4: Verify step counter shows 1
Step 5: Move player another tile
Step 6: Verify step counter shows 2
Step 7: Attempt to move into wall
Step 8: Verify step counter does not increment

description: HP bar displays correct visual percentage
steps: Step 1: Start a new game with 1000/1000 HP
Step 2: Verify HP bar is full and green
Step 3: Take damage in combat
Step 4: Verify HP bar decreases visually
Step 5: Reduce HP below 50%
Step 6: Verify HP bar changes to yellow
Step 7: Reduce HP below 25%
Step 8: Verify HP bar changes to red

description: Message log displays color-coded messages
steps: Step 1: Start a new game

Step 5: Verify message log shows red message for damage

description: Mini-map shows visited floor layout

Step 5: Verify mini-map shows floor 1 layout

description: Complete playthrough from floor 0 to floor 10 is possible
steps: Step 1: Start new game on floor 0
Step 2: Clear all monsters on floor 0
Step 3: Collect all items on floor 0
Step 4: Navigate to floor 1
Step 5: Clear floor 1 and progress to floor 2
Step 6: Continue through all floors systematically
Step 7: Collect keys to open doors
Step 8: Build stats to defeat stronger monsters
Step 9: Reach floor 10
Step 10: Defeat Floor Guardian
Step 11: Collect Holy Sword
Step 12: Defeat Tower Lord
Step 13: Verify victory screen appears
Step 14: Verify no softlocks encountered

description: Game balance allows clearing floor 0 with starting stats
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Record starting stats (HP:1000, ATK:10, DEF:10)
Step 3: Fight Green Slime without any upgrades
Step 4: Verify player can defeat Green Slime
Step 5: Verify player retains most HP
Step 6: Fight Red Bat without upgrades
Step 7: Verify player can defeat Red Bat
Step 8: Verify floor 0 is beatable with starting stats

description: Strategic routing is required for optimal progression
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Try to progress without collecting items
Step 3: Verify player becomes stuck on floor 2-3
Step 4: Restart and collect items strategically
Step 5: Verify proper item collection enables progression
Step 6: Verify key routing decisions impact success

description: Keys are scarce enough to create meaningful choices
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Count total yellow keys on floor 0-1
Step 3: Count total yellow doors on floor 0-1
Step 4: Verify keys are limited
Step 5: Verify player must choose which doors to open
Step 6: Verify wrong key usage can lead to suboptimal path

description: No softlocks exist in game design
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Try various paths and key usage patterns
Step 3: Verify it's always possible to reach victory
Step 4: Verify no dead-end paths exist
Step 5: Verify keys can always reach required doors
Step 6: Verify player can always backtrack

description: Combat math is calculated correctly per specification
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Record player stats (ATK:10, DEF:10)
Step 3: Fight Green Slime (HP:35, ATK:18, DEF:1)
Step 4: Calculate expected damage: Player deals 10-1=9 per round
Step 5: Calculate expected damage taken: 18-10=8 per round
Step 6: Verify actual combat matches calculations
Step 7: Verify rounds to defeat: ceiling(35/9)=4 rounds
Step 8: Verify HP lost: 4*8=32 damage

description: Monster damage cannot go below zero
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Collect many gems to increase DEF to 50+
Step 3: Fight Green Slime (ATK:18, DEF:1)
Step 4: Verify damage taken is 0 (DEF > Monster ATK)
Step 5: Verify player takes no damage
Step 6: Verify combat still resolves correctly

description: Player damage cannot go below zero
steps: Step 1: Start new game with ATK:10
Step 2: Try to fight monster with very high DEF
Step 3: Verify player deals 0 damage if ATK < Monster DEF
Step 4: Verify combat resolves with player defeat
Step 5: Verify no negative damage is calculated

description: Equipment properly replaces previous equipment
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Collect Iron Sword (+10 ATK)
Step 3: Verify ATK increases by 10
Step 4: Collect Steel Sword (+20 ATK)
Step 5: Verify ATK increases by 10 total (not 30)
Step 6: Verify Steel Sword replaced Iron Sword
Step 7: Test with shields as well

description: Potions respect max HP cap
steps: Step 1: Start new game with 1000/1000 HP
Step 2: Use small potion (+200 HP)
Step 3: Verify HP remains 1000 (capped at max)
Step 4: Take 100 damage
Step 5: Use big potion (+500 HP)
Step 6: Verify HP is 1000 (not 1400)
Step 7: Verify potions never exceed max HP

description: Super potion always heals to max HP
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Reduce HP to 200/1000
Step 3: Use super potion
Step 4: Verify HP is restored to 1000/1000
Step 5: Take damage again
Step 6: Use another super potion
Step 7: Verify HP is restored to max again

description: All 11 floors load correctly
steps: Step 1: Start new game on floor 0
Step 2: Navigate to floor 1
Step 3: Verify floor 1 loads with correct layout
Step 4: Continue to floor 2
Step 5: Verify floor 2 loads correctly
Step 6: Progress through all floors 3-10
Step 7: Verify each floor loads with correct content
Step 8: Verify no floor fails to load

description: Player position is preserved when changing floors
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Move player to specific tile on floor 0
Step 3: Record tile position
Step 4: Go up stairs to floor 1
Step 5: Return to floor 0 via stairs down
Step 6: Verify player is at same position
Step 7: Test with multiple floors

description: Map state is preserved when changing floors
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Open a door on floor 0
Step 3: Pick up an item on floor 0
Step 4: Go to floor 1
Step 5: Return to floor 0
Step 6: Verify door remains open
Step 7: Verify item is still picked up
Step 8: Verify defeated monsters don't reappear

description: Game performance remains smooth with many animations
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Move player rapidly for 30 seconds
Step 3: Verify frame rate remains smooth
Step 4: Fight multiple monsters in sequence
Step 5: Verify combat animations don't lag
Step 6: Verify no memory leaks from animations

description: Game state is correct after loading save
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Play through 3 floors
Step 3: Open several doors
Step 4: Defeat several monsters
Step 5: Collect various items
Step 6: Save game
Step 7: Quit to main menu
Step 8: Load saved game
Step 9: Verify all doors are still open
Step 10: Verify monsters are still defeated
Step 11: Verify items are collected
Step 12: Verify player stats match saved state

description: Multiple save slots work independently
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Play and save to slot 1
Step 3: Play more and save to slot 2
Step 4: Verify slot 1 has different state than slot 2
Step 5: Load slot 1
Step 6: Verify correct state is loaded
Step 7: Load slot 2
Step 8: Verify different state is loaded

description: Game saves map state (opened doors, cleared monsters)
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Open a door on floor 0
Step 3: Defeat a monster on floor 1
Step 4: Save game
Step 5: Load game
Step 6: Verify door on floor 0 is still open
Step 7: Verify monster on floor 1 is still defeated

description: Keyboard input doesn't have lag
steps: Step 1: Start new game
Step 2: Press movement key rapidly
Step 3: Verify each press registers immediately
Step 4: Verify no input delay is perceptible
Step 5: Test with all movement keys

description: Final boss is challenging but beatable

Step 2: Collect all items including Holy Sword

Step 4: Fight Tower Lord

Step 6: Verify Tower Lord can be defeated
Step 7: Verify victory requires good play but is achievable
